para.verbatim: return human readable name of subclass
return human readable name of subclass in plural form
return name of subtype for serialization purposes
Creates simple sphere object with center in zero and radius - 1
Finds best sphere to approx given points
clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
Create and generate list of bounded getters and setters for the main properties of feature object, together with prop. name for display and edit into UI.
Since a point on an abstract feature is difficult to uniquely parameterize, the projection function simultaneously returns the normal to the surface at the projection point.
updates xf to fit given center
updates xf to fit given normal
updates xf to fit given radius
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object

Generated from: MR::CircleObject Aliases: ObjKindTraits_FeaturesObjectKind_Circle.type
Object to show sphere feature, position and radius are controlled by xf
